headlines.headline: Xelvol Biotech announces breakthrough in cloud infrastructure

sentiment.reasoning: A breakthrough in cloud infrastructure for a biotech firm is ambiguous and lacks specific financial context or commercial application.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
